name: Hearts Plush Embossed Baby Blanket - Pink - Cloud Island™
description:
Embrace your new bundle of joy with this Pink Hearts Plush Embossed Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. The soft plush polyester will keep your loved one warm and cozy in your loving arms. You can also use it as a nursing cover or outdoors as a stroller cover to keep the sun out of baby's eyes during a walk in the park.

Sleep Safely, Little One
When putting baby to sleep, “Bare is Best” in the crib. Use a firm, tight-fitting mattress and remove pillows, quilts, comforters, toys and other soft items. For more information about safe sleep, visit www.cpsc.gov

We made it better so you can feel better.
This product is STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® certified, meaning it is free from harmful levels of chemical substances.
